title: Create Forge Light Modpack
description: A collection of Create mods and others which enhance the experience and performance of the game.
body:
This modpack is a collection of some mods which aim to provide a great experience when playing with the Create mod. From epic biomes with Biomes O' Plenty & brand new villages with CTOV to inventory management with Sophisticated Backpacks, this modpack adds a wide range of content, quality of life features and performance enhancements to the game. I have tried to make this modpack as light as possible, while providing a unique experience and bearable performance _(the best that's possible on modern Minecraft)_.

_On the latest version:_

**Content mods:** - _these are not strict categories as some are a combination_
- Biomes O' Plenty
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Create
- CTOV - Create Structures
- CTOV - Farmer's Delight Compatibility
- Explorer's Compass
- Explorify
- Farmer's Cutting: Biomes O' Plenty
- Farmer's Delight
- GraveStone Mod
- Naturalist
- Nature's Compass
- Sleeping Bags
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- TerraBlender
- Terralith
- Vein Mining

**Create addons:**
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Deco Additions
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Copycats+
- Create Enchantment Industry
- Create Structures
- Create Steam 'n' Rails - _disabled by default until updated for Create 0.6_

**Quality of life mods:**
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- AppleSkin
- Carry On
- Cherished Worlds
- Continuity
- Cubes without Borders - _disabled by default_
- Curios API
- e4mc
- FastQuit-Forge
- Freecam
- Full Brightness Toggle
- Jade
- Just Enough Items
- Just Zoom
- Model Gap Fix
- Mouse Tweaks
- Sodium Dynamic Lights
- Sort It Out!
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map

**Performance mods:**
- Clumps
- Distant Horizons - _does not improve performance but does allow for higher render distances with the use of an LOD system_
- Embeddium
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Memory Leak Fix
- ModernFix
- Noisium

**Dependencies:**
- Architectury API
- Collective
- Cloth Config API
- Forgified Fabric API
- Geckolib
- GlitchCore
- JamLib
- Konkrete
- Kotlin for Forge
- Lithostitched
- Sinytra Connector
- Sodium Options API
- Sophisticated Core

**Resource packs:**
- Fresh Animations
- Custom VanillaTweaks resource pack - _([VanillaTweaks website](https://vanillatweaks.net/))_

**Data packs** _(from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/))_
- Anti-Creeper Grief
- Anti-Enderman Grief
- Cauldron Concrete
- Coordinates HUD - _disabled by default_
- Crafting Tweaks
- Double Shulker Shells
- Fast Leaf Decay - _disabled by default_
- Silence Mobs
- Villager Death Messages
- Villager Workstation Highlights
